sqlQuery.name: EdaStudyMapping
sqlQuery.sql: select dataset_stable_id as dataset_id, study_stable_id as eda_study_id from @VDI_DATASETS_SCHEMA@.userstudydatasetid

sqlQuery.name: VEuPathDBIdProject
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as veupathdb_id, CASE WHEN project_id = 'EuPathDB' THEN 'VEuPathDB' WHEN project_id = 'ClinEpiDB' THEN 'dataExplorer' ELSE project_id END as veupathdb_project FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_project

sqlQuery.name: OwnerInfo
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as owner_name, organization as owner_organization from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d, (select * from public.crosstab( 'select user_id, key, value from @REMOTE_USERACCOUNTS_SCHEMA@account_properties where key in (''first_name'', ''organization'', ''middle_name'', ''last_name'') order by user_id, key', 'SELECT unnest(ARRAY[''first_name'', ''last_name'', ''middle_name'', ''organization''])') as userinfo ( user_id bigint, first_name varchar(4000), last_name varchar(4000), middle_name varchar(4000), organization varchar(4000)) ) userinfo where d.owner = userinfo.user_id

sqlQuery.name: CoreMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, owner, type_name, type_version, category, deleted_status, CASE WHEN is_public THEN 'Public' ELSE 'Private' END as is_public, CASE WHEN accessibility = 'public' THEN 'Open access' WHEN accessibility = 'private' THEN 'Restricted' WHEN accessibility = 'protected' THEN 'Protected' WHEN accessibility = 'controlled' THEN 'Controlled' END as accessibility, days_for_approval, TO_CHAR(creation_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as creation_date FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset

sqlQuery.name: DescriptiveMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, name, summary, description,disclaimer, program_name, project_name, short_attribution, short_name FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_meta

sqlQuery.name: DatasetAlias
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.user_dataset_id) as dataset_id, CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.user_dataset_id) as old_dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.availableuserdatasets d GROUP BY dataset_id,old_dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: PrimaryContact
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as primary_contact_name, affiliation as primary_affiliation, email as primary_email FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, affiliation, email, first_name, last_name, middle_name FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_contact WHERE is_primary is true ) prim on d.dataset_id = prim.dataset_id --needed? ORDER BY last_name, first_name

sqlQuery.name: PrimaryPublication
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, primary_publication FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, citation as primary_publication FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_publication WHERE is_primary is true ) prim on d.dataset_id = prim.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: Search
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, CASE WHEN (type_name = 'genelist' OR type_name = 'rnaseq' OR type_name = 'phenotype' ) THEN 'Identify genes based on ' || category WHEN type_name = 'isasimple' THEN 'Browse and subset this dataset' WHEN type_name = 'bigwigfiles' THEN 'View in Genome Browser' ELSE null END as display_text, CASE WHEN type_name = 'genelist' THEN '/search/transcript/GenesByUserDatasetGeneList?param.geneListUserDataset=' || dataset_id || '&autoRun' WHEN type_name = 'rnaseq' THEN '/search/transcript/GenesByRNASeqUserDataset?param.rna_seq_dataset=' || dataset_id WHEN type_name = 'phenotype' THEN '/search/transcript/GenesByPhenotypeUserDataset?param.eda_dataset_id=' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) WHEN type_name = 'isasimple' THEN '/workspace/analyses/' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id, '/new') WHEN type_name = 'bigwigfiles' THEN '/../../a/jbrowse/index.html?data=/a/service/jbrowse/tracks/' || 'myorg&tracks=gene,mydsname%' || 'myfilename&highlight=&loc=myseqname' ELSE null END as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset

sqlQuery.name: ExpOrganism
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, exp_organism FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, species || ' ' || strain as exp_organism FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_organism WHERE organism_type = 'experimental' ) prim on d.dataset_id = prim.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: RefOrganism
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, ref_organism FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, organism_name as ref_organism FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_dependency d, apidbtuning.organismattributes org WHERE substring(identifier FROM '^[A-Za-z]+-\d+_(.+)_Genome') = org.name_for_filenames ) prim on d.dataset_id = prim.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: Characteristics
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, study_design, study_type, participant_ages, sample_year_start, sample_year_end from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, study_design, study_type, participant_ages, sample_year_start, sample_year_end FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_characteristics ) char on char.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: ClinicalOrField
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, (case when coalesce(study_design, study_type, participant_ages) is null and coalesce(sample_year_start, sample_year_end) is null and is_public = 't' and type_name = 'isasimple' then 'No' when coalesce(study_design, study_type, participant_ages) is not null and coalesce(sample_year_start, sample_year_end) is not null then 'Yes' else ' ' end ) as is_clinical_field from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, study_design, study_type, participant_ages, sample_year_start, sample_year_end FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_characteristics ) char on char.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: OutcomesList
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, outcomes_list from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, string_agg(outcome, ', ' order by LOWER(outcome)) as outcomes_list FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_outcome group by dataset_id ) o on o.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: CountriesList
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, countries_list from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, string_agg(country, ', ' order by LOWER(country)) as countries_list FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_country group by dataset_id ) o on o.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: SpeciesList
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, species_list from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, string_agg(species, ', ' order by LOWER(species)) as species_list FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_species group by dataset_id ) o on o.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: FactorsList
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, factors_list from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, string_agg(factor, ', ' order by LOWER(factor)) as factors_list FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_associated_factor group by dataset_id ) o on o.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: SampleTypesList
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, sampletypes_list from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT dataset_id, string_agg(type, ', ' order by LOWER(type)) as sampletypes_list FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_sample_type group by dataset_id ) o on o.dataset_id = d.dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: Publications
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, external_id, type, regexp_replace(citation, '\s+<', ' <') AS citation, CASE WHEN is_primary THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as is_primary, CASE WHEN type = 'PubMed' THEN 'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/' || external_id WHEN type = 'DOI' THEN 'https://doi.org/' || external_id ELSE NULL END as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_publication ORDER BY is_primary DESC, external_id

sqlQuery.name: Contacts
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as contact_name, affiliation, email, country, CASE WHEN is_primary THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as is_primary FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_contact ORDER BY is_primary DESC, LOWER(last_name), LOWER(first_name)

sqlQuery.name: Organisms
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, organism_type, species, strain FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_organism ORDER BY organism_type, LOWER(species)

sqlQuery.name: HyperLinks
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, url, description FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_hyperlink ORDER BY LOWER(description)

sqlQuery.name: AssociatedFactors
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', daf.dataset_id) as dataset_id, factor from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_associated_factor daf ORDER BY LOWER(factor)

sqlQuery.name: FundingAwards
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, agency, award_number FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_funding_award ORDER BY LOWER(agency), LOWER(award_number)

sqlQuery.name: Countries
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, country FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_country ORDER BY LOWER(country)

sqlQuery.name: Species
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, species FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_species ORDER BY LOWER(species)

sqlQuery.name: Outcomes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, outcome FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_outcome ORDER BY LOWER(outcome)

sqlQuery.name: Characteristics
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, study_design, study_type, participant_ages, sample_year_start, sample_year_end FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_characteristics

sqlQuery.name: Projects
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, project_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_project ORDER BY project_id

sqlQuery.name: DataSources
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, url, version FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_source ORDER BY LOWER(url),version

sqlQuery.name: SampleTypes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_sample_type ORDER BY LOWER(type)

sqlQuery.name: ExternalIds
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 'DOI' as identifier_type, doi as identifier_value FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_doi WHERE doi IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 'BioProject' as identifier_type, bioproject_id as identifier_value FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_bioproject_id WHERE bioproject_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY identifier_type, identifier_value

sqlQuery.name: LinkedDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, linked_dataset_id, linked_dataset_type, shares_records FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_link ORDER BY linked_dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: ExploreWebsite
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 1 as order, CASE WHEN (type_name = 'genelist' OR type_name = 'rnaseq' OR type_name = 'phenotype' ) THEN 'Identify genes by this dataset' WHEN type_name = 'isasimple' THEN 'Browse and subset this dataset' WHEN type_name = 'bigwigfiles' THEN 'View in Genome Browser' ELSE null END as description, CASE WHEN type_name = 'genelist' THEN '/a/app/search/transcript/GenesByUserDatasetGeneList?param.geneListUserDataset=' || dataset_id || '&autoRun' WHEN type_name = 'rnaseq' THEN '/a/app/search/transcript/GenesByRNASeqUserDataset?param.rna_seq_dataset=' || dataset_id WHEN type_name = 'phenotype' THEN '/a/app/search/transcript/GenesByPhenotypeUserDataset?param.eda_dataset_id=' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) WHEN type_name = 'isasimple' THEN '/a/app/workspace/analyses/' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id, '/new') WHEN type_name = 'bigwigfiles' THEN '/a/jbrowse/index.html?data=/a/service/jbrowse/tracks/' || 'myorg&tracks=gene,mydsname%' || 'myfilename&highlight=&loc=myseqname' ELSE null END as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset

sqlQuery.name: ExploreWebsite
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 1 as order, 'Browse and Subset Data' as description, '/a/app/workspace/analyses/' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) || '/new' as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset UNION SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 2 as order, 'Visualize Data' as description, '/a/app/workspace/analyses/' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) || '/new/visualizations' as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset UNION SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, 3 as order, 'Explore Data on Interactive Map' as description, '/a/app/workspace/maps/' || CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) || '/new' as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset

sqlQuery.name: Variables
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id , v.display_name , array_to_string(ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(provider_label::jsonb)), '; ') as provider_label , etg.display_name as entity_name , definition , data_type FROM @VDI_DATASETS_SCHEMA@.Variable v, @VDI_DATASETS_SCHEMA@.entitytypegraph etg WHERE v.entity_stable_id = etg.stable_id AND v.study_stable_id = etg.study_stable_id AND (v.hidden is null or v.hidden not like '%everywhere%') ORDER BY LOWER(v.display_name)
